__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Hamilton's Washer,Hunter's Suitcase,Gefjon's Plough,Silver Stag Vessel,Spencer's Microwave
|rank=blue
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail HP +240; Fungus Farm LVL: 90/90
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Fungus Farm LVL]]
